잠언 12:1.content: Whoever loves correction loves knowledge, but he who hates reproof is stupid.

잠언 12:2.content: A good man shall obtain favor from Yahweh, but he will condemn a man of wicked plans.

잠언 12:3.content: A man shall not be established by wickedness, but the root of the righteous shall not be moved.

잠언 12:4.content: A worthy woman is the crown of her husband, but a disgraceful wife is as rottenness in his bones.

잠언 12:5.content: The thoughts of the righteous are just, but the advice of the wicked is deceitful.

잠언 12:6.content: The words of the wicked are about lying in wait for blood, but the speech of the upright rescues them.

잠언 12:7.content: The wicked are overthrown, and are no more, but the house of the righteous shall stand.

잠언 12:8.content: A man shall be commended according to his wisdom, but he who has a warped mind shall be despised.

잠언 12:9.content: Better is he who is little known, and has a servant, than he who honors himself, and lacks bread.

잠언 12:10.content: A righteous man respects the life of his animal, but the tender mercies of the wicked are cruel.

잠언 12:11.content: He who tills his land shall have plenty of bread, but he who chases fantasies is void of understanding.

잠언 12:12.content: The wicked desires the plunder of evil men, but the root of the righteous flourishes.

잠언 12:13.content: An evil man is trapped by sinfulness of lips, but the righteous shall come out of trouble.

잠언 12:14.content: A man shall be satisfied with good by the fruit of his mouth. The work of a man’s hands shall be rewarded to him.

잠언 12:15.content: The way of a fool is right in his own eyes, but he who is wise listens to counsel.

잠언 12:16.content: A fool shows his annoyance the same day, but one who overlooks an insult is prudent.

잠언 12:17.content: He who is truthful testifies honestly, but a false witness lies.

잠언 12:18.content: There is one who speaks rashly like the piercing of a sword, but the tongue of the wise heals.

잠언 12:19.content: Truth’s lips will be established forever, but a lying tongue is only momentary.

잠언 12:20.content: Deceit is in the heart of those who plot evil, but joy comes to the promoters of peace.

잠언 12:21.content: No mischief shall happen to the righteous, but the wicked shall be filled with evil.

잠언 12:22.content: Lying lips are an abomination to Yahweh, but those who do the truth are his delight.

잠언 12:23.content: A prudent man keeps his knowledge, but the hearts of fools proclaim foolishness.

잠언 12:24.content: The hands of the diligent ones shall rule, but laziness ends in slave labor.

잠언 12:25.content: Anxiety in a man’s heart weighs it down, but a kind word makes it glad.

잠언 12:26.content: A righteous person is cautious in friendship, but the way of the wicked leads them astray.

잠언 12:27.content: The slothful man doesn’t roast his game, but the possessions of diligent men are prized.

잠언 12:28.content: In the way of righteousness is life; in its path there is no death.
